title: Lead Investment Banker at Walker Chandiok

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Walker Chandiok
jsonLd.description:
We at Walker Chandiok are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Walker Chandiok:
Walker Chandiok is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok!
